changes_summary: Fixed two issues: (1) Added chunk 67dc1f3e-2ee7-4a56-822f-bf81c5335e08 to properly cite the short-term investments figure of $51,951,000,000, which was previously unsupported. (2) Revised the net debt explanation to clarify that the calculation uses only cash and equivalents ($10,605,000,000), not short-term investments, accurately reflecting the cited calculation (CALC_ID: 36dc1d31-f0f0-44e7-b628-679358946106) which computes net debt as total debt minus cash only. Separated the short-term investments mention into its own sentence to avoid implying it was used in the net debt calculation.
